scheme_name: Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Govt Adarsh ​​Residential Schools (SC) Scheme
page_title: Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Govt Adarsh ​​Residential Schools (SC) Scheme

details: The “Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Government Adarsh Residential Schools (SC)” scheme was launched by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to expand access to quality residential education for scheduled caste (SC) students in standards 9
. Under this scheme, eligible SC students receive free boarding, lodging, textbooks, uniforms, meals, and additional support services to enhance academic participation.
benefits: Board and lodging, meals, textbooks, uniforms, and water
Study materials, mid‑day meals, and other academic support
Ration card, PH identity card, and other entitlements, as applicable
eligibility: The applicant should be a student.
The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category.
The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant must be currently studying in standard 9
The applicant must have passed the previous annual exam with at least 50% marks (or a government-sanctioned exemption).
Returning students must have passed with at least a second class with 50% to be considered for re-admission.

online: The eligible applicant may visit the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal:
On the home page, under the tab ‘Citizen Login’, click on New User ‘
Enter your Full Name as per Aadhaar Card, Gender, Date of Birth, Aadhaar Card Number, Email ID, Caste etc. and then click on ‘Register’.
After successful registration, the applicants can login through their User ID and Password.
Now, click on ‘User Profile’ to update your profile.
Fill in all the mandatory information and then click on ‘Update’.
After updating the profile successfully, select the scheme appearing on the home page; an application form will open.
Fill in all the mandatory details in the application form and upload all the relevant documents.
Now agree with the terms & conditions and click on ‘Save Application’.

Submit the application form and take out the print of the application for future reference. The applicant can note down the application number to track the application status by logging into the portal using their User ID and Password.

documents_required: Other Mark Sheets/Last Year Mark sheet

faqs.question: Who can apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Only Scheduled Caste (SC) students studying in Std. 9 to 12 in Gujarat are eligible.

faqs.question: Is there any income limit to apply?
faqs.answer: No, there is no family or individual income limit for this scheme.

faqs.question: What benefits do students receive under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students receive free boarding, meals, textbooks, uniforms, and other academic support.

faqs.question: How can I apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Applications must be submitted online via esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in.

faqs.question: Is there a cost to apply?
faqs.answer: No, the application process is completely free of cost.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Documents like Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, mark sheet, passport-size photo, and residence proof are required.

faqs.question: Are students from outside Gujarat eligible?
faqs.answer: No, only students domiciled in Gujarat are eligible.

faqs.question: Is distance education allowed under this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only students enrolled in regular schools are eligible.

faqs.question: What happens if a student violates hostel rules?
faqs.answer: Admission may be cancelled if students break rules or show misconduct.

faqs.question: Where can I find more information?
faqs.answer: Visit https://sje.gujarat.gov.in or the application portal at https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in.
